title: Building an x86 OS from Scratch
summary: A bare-metal x86 32-bit operating system built from the ground up in C++ and x86 assembly — no stdlib, no RTTI, no exceptions. Covers protected mode setup, interrupt handling, PS/2 drivers, PCI enumeration, physical memory management, a heap allocator, VGA graphics mode, a driver abstraction layer, ATA PIO disk I/O, MBR partition parsing, and a FAT32 reader.
